qas.a:
Sexual Assault Incident Data Collection Reports Form

Commander, Navy Installations Command (SAVI Program Manager)

qas.q: The SARC shall provide the installation Commander of sexual assault victims with information regarding unrestricted reports within __________ hours.

qas.a:
The medical and forensic examination of a sexual assault victim
(found on page 2-10)

qas.q: How often do victims receive updates on their case?
qas.a:
Monthly until final disposition
(found on pages 2B-6, 2B-11, and 4-10)

qas.q: Unrestricted reports of sexual assault involving victims in thecommand are renewed by the SACMG how often?

qas.a:
Sexual Assault Case Management Group
(found on page ii)

qas.q: Who implements and supports the SAVI program?

qas.a:
The centralized database for the collection and maintenance of information regarding sexual assault
(found on page A-2)

qas.q: Records of unrestricted reports are retained for ________________
Records of restricted reports are retained for ________________
